gaps.summary: Real Path to Live mailbox creation and amendment remain NHS-admin-managed and are not lawfully auto-mutated from the repo harness.
gaps.fallback: Use the tracked registry, contract, and runbook; then execute the mailbox-admin steps manually and compare against the masked manifest evidence.
gaps.followUpAction: When lawful mailbox-admin access is available, bind real selectors and replace the manual bridge with portal-backed convergence.

gaps.summary: MOLES mailbox lookup and tracking remain smartcard and HSCN-gated, so repo-owned browser automation stops at a masked local twin.
gaps.fallback: Record ODS-plus-workflow lookup inputs in the manifest and run the operator-only MOLES step through the manual bridge.
gaps.followUpAction: Capture a lawful HSCN and smartcard-backed route check once access is granted.

gaps.summary: Candidate Vecells workflow IDs must still be mapped against the current NHS worksheet or approved via the workflow-request process.
gaps.fallback: Keep the candidate workflow IDs explicit in the manifest and treat them as controlled placeholders until approval is complete.
gaps.followUpAction: Reconcile the manifest against the current NHS workflow sheet before widening beyond controlled non-production use.

gaps.summary: Path to Live integration can rehearse API connectivity without a mailbox, but it is not a message route binding and cannot stand in for deployment routing proof.
gaps.fallback: Represent PTL integration explicitly in the environment matrix as pre-mailbox rehearsal only.
gaps.followUpAction: Promote the route to a mailbox-backed PTL deployment row before claiming route verification.
